pipesnphysics.gui.goggles.not_connected: No Flow: not connected to a network
pipesnphysics.gui.goggles.no_flow_dry: No Flow: pipe is dry, nothing reaching it
pipesnphysics.gui.goggles.no_flow_starve: No Flow: pump can't pull its supply (check the source)
pipesnphysics.gui.goggles.no_flow_settle: No Flow: settled, levels are balanced
pipesnphysics.gui.goggles.blocked: No Flow: this line is shut
pipesnphysics.gui.goggles.stalled: No Flow: the tank or machine ahead is full
pipesnphysics.gui.goggles.no_head: No Flow: not enough RPM to lift this high
pipesnphysics.gui.goggles.reach_limit: Reach limit: raise the supply or add a pump
pipesnphysics.gui.goggles.detail.valve: No Flow: a valve or filter is shut here
pipesnphysics.gui.goggles.detail.pump_of: No Flow: a pump on this line is unpowered
pipesnphysics.gui.goggles.detail.crest: No Flow: air break over the crest
pipesnphysics.gui.goggles.detail.sink_fu: No Flow: the destination is full
pipesnphysics.gui.goggles.detail.source_: No Flow: the supply can't be drawn
